title: AN  ACT AMENDING SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FORTY-NINE HUNDRED AND SIXTY-SEVEN, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17144 / 65 OG No. 28, 7105 (July 14, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5428, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT AMENDING SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FORTY-NINE HUNDRED AND SIXTY-SEVEN, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section three of Republic Act Numbered Forty-nine hundred and sixty-seven is hereby amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 3. The life of the Abaca and Other Fibers DevelÂopment Board shall be deemed extended up to June thirty, nineteen hundred and seventy-two."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
